meta_description: Aktionstage of Christian university groups in Berlin, June 09–11, 2026. Coffee, mate, music and good conversations at Berlin universities.
about_text: Aktionstage are days where we intentionally hold various events at universities and colleges to start conversations about faith and Jesus. This year, we're doing this over three days, from June 09–11, 2026. We'll be giving away coffee & mate to serve our fellow students. Students of all disciplines and backgrounds are welcome – whether you believe, have questions, or are simply curious!
program_subtitle: Events at various universities and colleges

datenschutz_text:
1. Responsible Party

[Enter name and contact details of the responsible party]

2. Hosting

This website is hosted by Vercel Inc. (340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA). When you visit our website, Vercel automatically collects technical data in server log files (e.g., IP address, time of access, page visited). This data is technically necessary for providing the website. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR. Vercel may process data in the USA based on Standard Contractual Clauses (Art. 46(2)(c) GDPR).

3. Web Analytics (Vercel Web Analytics)

We use Vercel Web Analytics, a privacy-friendly analytics service. This service uses no cookies, stores no IP addresses, and uses no fingerprinting. Only anonymous, aggregated data is collected (e.g., page views, referral sources, device category). It is not possible to trace this data back to individuals. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.

4. Contact Form

When you contact us via the contact form, the data you provide (name, email, message) is transmitted to Web3Forms (a form service) for processing and forwarded to us by email. Web3Forms does not permanently store data. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (consent by submitting the form). You may withdraw your consent at any time with effect for the future.

5. Cookies

Our website uses a cookie for language settings ("lang"). This cookie is technically necessary and does not contain personal data. It is only set when you manually switch the language. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.

6. Your Rights

You have the right to access (Art. 15 GDPR), rectification (Art. 16 GDPR), erasure (Art. 17 GDPR), restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR), data portability (Art. 20 GDPR), and objection (Art. 21 GDPR). Contact us at: info@aktionstage.berlin

You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.
